description: Auditable strategic-risk memos for AI agents: sanctions, regulatory, geopolitics, trade.
name: io.github.vassiliylakhonin/agenda-intelligence-md

environmentVariables.description: Optional. When set together with the [llm] extra (pip install 'agenda-intelligence-md[llm]'), the `analyze` tool calls the Anthropic API directly and returns a schema-validated memo. Without this key, `analyze` returns the assembled system_prompt for the host model to complete.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Anthropic model identifier used when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. Defaults to a current Claude model.
environmentVariables.name: AGENDA_INTELLIGENCE_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Max tokens for the Anthropic call from `analyze`. Defaults to 4096.
environmentVariables.name: AGENDA_INTELLIGENCE_MAX_TOKENS

title: Agenda Intelligence
